title: Cheerful
description: Replaces boring unicode symbols with uniquely styled emojis.
body:
![Emojis floating around](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34c03a1c94a4926140efcaaec3550ae02c244e83_0.webp) #
Cheerful 😄
[![Support Me](https://img.shields.io/badge/Buy%20Me%20a%20Coffee-Support-yellow?style=flat&logo=buymeacoffee)](https://www.buymeacoffee.com/manchick) [![Sources](https://img.shields.io/badge/Documentation-Sources-white?style=flat&logo=github)](https://github.com/Manchick0/Cheerful) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20the%20Workshop-Discord-blue?style=flat&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/ANntBKUPmC) Sometimes, simple text just isn't enough to **express your emotions**. You'd want to use emojis in such special cases, but Minecraft doesn't support them. Well, it **does**, but the way they look expresses only one emotion - **confusion**. 🤷 **Cheerful** replaces **around 100** of these pesky Unicode symbols with styled emojis. ##
Expressing Yourself 💛
Unicode has **thousands of different emojis**, but only a fraction of those may be represented and modified in Minecraft with a resource pack. Only those that are present on the **Basic Multilingual Plane**, which is still over 1000 different emojis. > 👀 Psst...

> Around **50** of Cheerful's **most essential** emojis are present as **Discord emojis** in the [Workshop](https://discord.gg/ANntBKUPmC). If you wish to use Cheerful's uniquely styled emojis on **Discord**, you're welcome to join our server. --- ![Tail, showing a player using the emojis in-game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3855d1d2727f7104fbb6d6065bc312e3894590f7.png)
